# CKSyncEngine.Event.AccountChange.ChangeType.signIn(currentUser:)

**Case**

A change indicating a sign-in to an iCloud account.

## Declaration

```swift
case signIn(currentUser: CKRecord.ID)
```

## Discussion

If your app has locally stored data when [doc://com.apple.cloudkit/documentation/CloudKit/CKSyncEngine-5sie5] notifies it about the device signing in to an iCloud account, perform one of the following actions:

- Keep the local data separate from any remote data
- Merge the local data with the account’s remote data
- Delete the local data
- Prompt the account’s owner to make the decision

## Account change types

- **CKSyncEngine.Event.AccountChange.ChangeType.signOut(previousUser:)**: A change indicating a sign-out of an iCloud account.
- **CKSyncEngine.Event.AccountChange.ChangeType.switchAccounts(previousUser:currentUser:)**: A change indicating a switch between two iCloud accounts.
